title: The Bone Harvester's Feast
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A small-town mortician discovers the dead buried in the local cemetery are regrowing their bones beneath the soil, and a secretive farmers' guild has been harvesting them for a centuries-old autumnal feast that keeps something beneath the church fed.
long_description: A small-town mortician discovers the dead buried in the local cemetery are regrowing their bones beneath the soil, and a secretive farmers' guild has been harvesting them for a centuries-old autumnal feast that keeps something beneath the church fed.
